summary: All three requirements (REQ-92, REQ-93, REQ-94) are implemented in the diff. The backend createCustomer function in main.mo properly persists customer data using the Map data structure. The frontend CustomerForm.tsx validates all four required fields before submission and correctly formats the data. The useCreateCustomer hook in useQueries.ts properly handles responses with enhanced error handling and invalidates the React Query cache on success. The CustomersPage.tsx shows success toast notifications and logs the created customer ID. No missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.
